{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1340049-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table public.roles (
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        name varchar(50) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uk_roles_name unique (name)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1375778-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table public.tenants (
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        deleted_at timestamp(6),
        updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        schema_name varchar(50) not null,
        name varchar(100) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uk_tenants_schema_name unique (schema_name)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1401997-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create index idx_tenants_schema_name 
       on public.tenants (schema_name)","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.141781-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table audit_logs (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        id uuid not null,
        action varchar(255),
        actor_email varchar(255),
        details TEXT,
        entity_id varchar(255),
        entity_type varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1449858-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table email_events (
        attempt_count integer not null,
        max_attempts integer not null,
        next_retry_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        occurred_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        email varchar(255) not null,
        event_type varchar(255) not null,
        html_content TEXT,
        reason varchar(255),
        status varchar(255) not null,
        subject varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1476047-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table lead_status_history (
        changed_at timestamp(6) not null,
        changed_by uuid,
        id uuid not null,
        lead_id uuid not null,
        status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1502336-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table leads (
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        deleted_at timestamp(6),
        updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        user_id uuid not null,
        phone varchar(20),
        status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')),
        email varchar(150) not null,
        name varchar(150) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uk_leads_email_user unique (email, user_id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1523397-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table login_audit (
        success boolean not null,
        suspicious boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        tenant_id uuid not null,
        user_id uuid,
        ip_address varchar(45),
        email varchar(320) not null,
        user_agent varchar(512),
        failure_reason varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1544464-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table logs (
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        user_id uuid,
        action TEXT not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1575185-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table payment_checkout_requests (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        email varchar(255) not null,
        nome_empresa varchar(255),
        nome_vendedor varchar(255) not null,
        provider varchar(255) not null,
        reference_id varchar(255) not null,
        slug varchar(255) not null,
        status varchar(255) not null,
        whatsapp_vendedor varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uq_payment_checkout_reference unique (reference_id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1606455-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table payment_events (
        processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        provider varchar(255) not null,
        provider_event_id varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uq_payment_event_provider_id unique (provider_event_id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1638064-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table payments (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        email varchar(255) not null,
        event_id varchar(255) not null unique,
        gateway varchar(255) not null,
        payload TEXT,
        status varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1679924-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table refresh_tokens (
        revoked boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        expires_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        user_id uuid not null,
        device_fingerprint varchar(255) not null,
        token_hash varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uq_refresh_token_hash unique (token_hash)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1716519-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table security_audit_logs (
        success boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        action varchar(50) not null check (action in ('LOGIN_SUCCESS','LOGIN_FAILED','ACCOUNT_LOCKED','PASSWORD_RESET_REQUESTED','PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS','USER_REGISTERED')),
        correlation_id varchar(100),
        ip_address varchar(100),
        tenant varchar(100) not null,
        email varchar(150) not null,
        user_agent varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1746401-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table settings (
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        deleted_at timestamp(6),
        updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
        whatsapp varchar(15) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        user_id uuid not null,
        company_name varchar(100),
        vendor_name varchar(100) not null,
        logo TEXT,
        welcome_message TEXT,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1778737-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table subscription_history (
        changed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_id uuid not null,
        external_event_id varchar(255),
        new_status varchar(255) not null check (new_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')),
        previous_status varchar(255) not null check (previous_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')),
        reason varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1804979-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table subscriptions (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        id uuid not null,
        email varchar(255),
        plan varchar(255),
        status varchar(255),
        stripe_customer_id varchar(255),
        stripe_subscription_id varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1826054-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table system_audit_logs (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        details varchar(2000),
        action varchar(255) not null,
        entity varchar(255) not null,
        entity_id varchar(255),
        performed_by varchar(255),
        tenant varchar(255),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1847027-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table user_sessions (
        active boolean not null,
        suspicious boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        last_access_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        revoked_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        id uuid not null,
        tenant_id uuid not null,
        user_id uuid not null,
        token_id varchar(36) not null unique,
        initial_ip_address varchar(45),
        ip_address varchar(45),
        initial_user_agent varchar(512),
        user_agent varchar(512),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1867881-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table users (
        failed_attempts integer not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) not null,
        credentials_updated_at timestamp(6),
        deleted_at timestamp(6),
        lock_until timestamp(6),
        updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
        id uuid not null,
        role_id uuid not null,
        email varchar(150) not null,
        name varchar(150) not null,
        password varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id),
        constraint uq_users_email unique (email)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1891258-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_audit_logs (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        entidade_id uuid not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_id uuid not null,
        acao varchar(255) not null,
        detalhes TEXT,
        entity_type varchar(255) not null,
        user_email varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1928342-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_features (
        enabled boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_id uuid not null,
        feature_key varchar(255) not null check (feature_key in ('AI_CHAT')),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1948967-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_lead_alerts (
        resolvido boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_lead_id uuid not null,
        mensagem TEXT not null,
        tipo varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.1968352-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_lead_conversations (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        lead_id uuid not null,
        vendor_lead_id uuid not null,
        role varchar(20),
        sender varchar(50),
        tenant varchar(100),
        content varchar(5000) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.198926-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_lead_messages (
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_lead_id uuid not null,
        role varchar(20) not null check (role in ('USER','AI')),
        message TEXT not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.200487-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_lead_stage_history (
        changed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_lead_id uuid not null,
        new_stage varchar(255) not null,
        previous_stage varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.2025811-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_leads (
        score integer not null,
        created_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_id uuid not null,
        nome_completo varchar(255) not null,
        owner_email varchar(255),
        resumo_estrategico TEXT,
        stage varchar(255) not null check (stage in ('NOVO','CONTATO','PROPOSTA','FECHADO','PERDIDO')),
        status varchar(255) not null,
        tipo_consorcio varchar(255),
        urgencia varchar(255),
        valor_credito varchar(255),
        whatsapp varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.205309-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_risk_alerts (
        resolved boolean not null,
        score integer not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_id uuid not null,
        risk_level varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.2074158-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendor_usage (
        alert100sent boolean not null,
        alert80sent boolean not null,
        used integer not null,
        period_end timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        period_start timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        id uuid not null,
        vendor_id uuid not null,
        quota_type varchar(255) not null check (quota_type in ('ACTIVE_LEADS','AI_EXECUTIONS')),
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.2099712-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table vendors (
        email_invalid boolean not null,
        created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        last_payment_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        next_billing_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        subscription_expires_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        subscription_started_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
        id uuid not null,
        cor_destaque varchar(255) not null,
        external_customer_id varchar(255),
        external_subscription_id varchar(255),
        logo_url varchar(255),
        mensagem_boas_vindas TEXT,
        name varchar(255),
        nome_empresa varchar(255),
        nome_vendedor varchar(255) not null,
        schema_name varchar(255),
        slug varchar(255) not null unique,
        subscription_status varchar(255) not null check (subscription_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')),
        user_email varchar(255) not null,
        whatsapp_vendedor varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.213088-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    create table webhook_events (
        received_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
        event_id varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (event_id)
    )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}

       add constraint fk_lsh_user 
       foreign key (changed_by)

{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.920544-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        vl1_0.id,
        vl1_0.created_date,
        vl1_0.nome_completo,
        vl1_0.owner_email,
        vl1_0.resumo_estrategico,
        vl1_0.score,
        vl1_0.stage,
        vl1_0.status,
        vl1_0.tipo_consorcio,
        vl1_0.urgencia,
        vl1_0.valor_credito,
        vl1_0.vendor_id,
        vl1_0.whatsapp 
    from
        vendor_leads vl1_0 
    where
        vl1_0.id=? 
        and vl1_0.vendor_id=?","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}

        resumo_estrategico=?,
        score=?,
        stage=?,
        status=?,
        tipo_consorcio=?,

{"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:31.9721015-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        vlsh1_0.id,
        vlsh1_0.changed_at,
        vlsh1_0.new_stage,
        vlsh1_0.previous_stage,
        vlsh1_0.vendor_lead_id 
    from
        vendor_lead_stage_history vlsh1_0 
    where
        vlsh1_0.vendor_lead_id=? 
    order by
        vlsh1_0.changed_at desc","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
